text.message: there is no way that was cpu placement
i'm in last and it was a solo
you guys were all tied at 2
there was no where to double block besides the 11 idk how their algo works
is anyone going to acknowledge this?
They were never going to trade you in that situation
if I were you I'd be upset
and you guys, I never would have blocked that 4
i would have taken my chances trying to pull it
they didn't want you to block them
